reference: I have a calcified granuloma in one of my right lower pelvic iliac chain lymph nodes. I have been experiencing a lot of pain in my lower right back and lower abdomen. I went to the doctor, and they ordered a computed tomography scan, which showed that there is more calcification appearing in the lymph node. The doctor has prescribed six hundred to eight hundred milligrams of ibuprofen three times a day. Is there anything else that I could do for the pain? It seems like a lot of Motrin, and could this be causing so much pain?
text: I have a calcified granuloma in one of my right lower pelvic iliac lymph nodes. I have been experiencing a lot of pain in my lower right back and lower abdomen. I went to the doctor, and they ordered a CT scan, which showed that there is more calcium appearing in the lymph node. The doctor has prescribed 600 to 800 mg of ibuprofen three times a day. Is there anything else that I can do for the pain? It seems like a lot of Motrin, and could this be causing so much pain...
